title: JUX-334 Mother of a friend Anna Machimura - Machimura Anna
overview: Anna, a mother who has been fond of her son's filial piety since her husband died. I loved him too much, and I was taking care of Takayoshi's sexual processing, but my friend Yota knew it ... Yota, who originally approached for such a body, forcibly pushed him down. From that day on, he'll be fooled by his obedience. I obey with all my heart that I don't want to be known only to my son, but one day, Yota who visited the house was in front of Takayoshi.
